extDescription.message: Free Skool video downloader. Save Skool, Loom, Vimeo, YouTube & Wistia lessons as MP4. 5 free downloads every week — no signup, no card.

updateFallback.message: v$1 is out — you're on v$2

creditsRemaining.message: $1 of $2 free downloads left this week

creditsExhausted.message: Weekly free downloads used up — resets in a few days

statusOpenLesson.message: Open a Skool lesson to start

hintOpenLesson.message: Go to your Skool classroom or community, then open a video.

hintNoVideo.message: Press play on the lesson video, then reopen this popup.

hintPickVideo.message: Pick a video to choose quality and download.

planLifetimeFeatureNoRenewal.message: No renewals, no expiry, no card on file

planLifetimeReassure.message: Costs less than 11 months of Monthly

freeBlockNote.message: Separate files — no merge, no credit used.

noSimdNote.message: This computer can't combine video and audio into one file — its processor is missing an instruction set Chrome needs (common on older CPUs and virtual machines). The two buttons below work every time.

weeklyLimitMsg.message: You've used your 5 free downloads this week — go unlimited to keep saving.

downloadStartError.message: Could not start the download. Try again.

ytPolicyBody.message: YouTube blocks downloads from browser extensions — all of them, not just ours. Our short guide has a copy-paste command that saves this exact video (link pre-filled). First time takes ~2 minutes, seconds after that.

reportSub.message: Sends a small diagnostic snapshot (extension version, plan, what was detected on this page, recent errors) straight to the developer. No page content or personal data.

reportNotePlaceholder.message: e.g. The Loom video on this lesson never finishes downloading

reportSentEmailNote.message: We'll email you when it's fixed.

reportClipboardFallback.message: Couldn't reach our server — report copied to your clipboard. Please paste it into an email to support@tailsgate.com.

reportServerError.message: Couldn't reach our server — please email support@tailsgate.com.

pricingSub.message: Your free plan covers 5 downloads a week. Unlock unlimited saves at every quality.

welcomeSub.message: Save Skool lessons — and any Loom, Vimeo, YouTube or Wistia video embedded inside them — as clean MP4 files, right from your browser.

step1.message: Open any lesson in your Skool classroom or community.

step2.message: Press play on the video so the extension can detect the stream.

step3.message: Click the Skool Video Downloader icon in your toolbar.

step4.message: Pick the video, choose a quality, and hit Download — it saves straight to your Downloads folder as MP4.

multiDownloadNote.message: Queue as many downloads as you like — they run one after another, with live progress and speed in the popup.

worksAcrossTitle.message: Works across every player Skool uses

platformNote.message: The extension auto-detects which platform each lesson uses and pulls the highest quality the source offers. Everything is processed locally on your device — no uploads, no tracking.

freeNote.message: 5 downloads every week are free — no credit card required.
